findings.detail: 4-node concept/binding constellation renders cleanly at 1400px. Name (blue) --assignment(=) binds to--> Value/object (purple) --carries a--> Type (green); Name --reassignment repoints--> New value (purple) -.carries its own.-> Type. Matches the intent: type belongs to the value not the name, reassignment repoints the name, dynamic typing = new value may differ. Title correctly carries the governing concept; node labels are all <=4 words and fuzzy-match corpus 5.1/5.6/5.8. No overlaps, no truncation, subtitles legible, color tiers consistent.
